untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) limit-up/limit-down moves (not directly available as indicator), (2) exactly 3+ consecutive directional bars (requires bar-by-bar sequencing logic not supported), (3) forced liquidation identification (not available as direct indicator). Translated core concept using ADX for trend confirmation, vol_ratio_20 for volume spike proxy, and SMA positioning for trend direction, but cannot fully capture the specific forced-liquidation contrarian timing mechanism.
translation_notes: Used adx_14 > 25 for strong trend confirmation (approximate 3+ consecutive directional movement). Used vol_ratio_20 > 1.5 as proxy for volume spike indicating forced liquidations (profit_taking_volume_spike_threshold: 150 approximated). Exits use recent support/resistance (s1/r1) as swing low/high proxies and log returns to detect consecutive closes against trend. Direction set to CONTEXT_DEPENDENT to allow both long and short entries based on trend direction.
